page.content: In fiscal year 2024, Stellantis allocated $450M towards AutonomousTech, delivering 1,500 units, contributing to a total R&D spend of $1.2B with 3,000 units delivered.

lines.text: In fiscal year 2024, Stellantis allocated $450M towards AutonomousTech, delivering 1,500 units, contributing to a total R&D

page.content: Within the software development category, $600M was invested with 1,200 units, while sensor technology included LidarSystems at $150M for 300 units, CameraSystems at $100M for 400 units, RadarSystems at $50M for 200 units, and AIResearch at $250M for 1,000 units. Additional expenditures encompassed SimulationTools at $80M for 600 units, TestingFacilities at $70M for 5 units, and Partnerships at $50M, supporting a staff headcount of 1,500 employees, 200 contractors, and 100 interns, across 4 research labs. In the Electric vehicle segment, 150,000 units were sold generating $1,200M in revenue, reflecting a year-over-year change of 25.0% and a market share of 30.0%.

lines.text: Within the software development category, $600M was invested with 1,200 units, while sensor technology included
LidarSystems at $150M for 300 units, CameraSystems at $100M for 400 units, RadarSystems at $50M for 200 units, and
AIResearch at $250M for 1,000 units. Additional expenditures encompassed SimulationTools at $80M for 600 units,
TestingFacilities at $70M for 5 units, and Partnerships at $50M, supporting a staff headcount of 1,500 employees, 200

page.content: The Plug-in Hybrid category accounted for 50,000 units sold and $400M in revenue, with a 10.0% year-over-year increase and a market share of 10.0%. Total EVs amounted to 200,000 units sold, yielding $1,600M in revenue, marking a 20.0% increase and a market share of 40.0%. Production costs included variable costs of $600M, fixed costs of $300M, totaling $900M with an average cost per unit of $4,500 and a cost change of -5.0%. The 2024 budget for R&D investment was $500M, emphasizing sustainability and battery technology, with a focus on a growth rate of 11.1% and projections for 2025 and 2026.
